---
title: "Báo cáo phòng Triển khai"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
css: styles.css
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")`'
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 13pt;
  font-family: Serif
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 80% !important;
  margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
#library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(repr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(highcharter)
library(shiny)
#library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(formattable)
library(scales)
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
library(stringi)
library(raster)
#library(rgdal)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggiraph)
library(googlesheets4)
library(shinydashboard)
library(shinyWidgets)

writeLines(
  paste0('{"buildTime": "', format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), '"}'),
  "last-build.json"
)
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
if (Sys.getenv("GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT") != "") {
  # Chạy trên GitHub Actions → dùng Service Account
  gs4_auth(path = Sys.getenv("GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT"))
} else {
  # Chạy local → đăng nhập thủ công
  gs4_auth()
}
sheet_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/12BlvL_Fxdubk5PL4G-pjX-c4_iQwiubVlknHCrAw5dw/edit?gid=904243310#gid=904243310"
b2c_aio <- read_sheet(sheet_url, sheet = "Chi tiết")

b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio[-c(1:4),c(1,2,3,10:20,22:27, 29:34, 36:44, 48, 53, 54, 56:68,51,79:80,82:83,85,86,78)]
n_aio <- c("don_huy", "ma_tinh", "ma_hd", "gtri", "namthang_ky", "ngay_ky", "dich_vu", "thang_DT", "ngay_tam_ung", "gtri_tam_ung", "loai_pin", "ma_pin", "ten_pin", "so_pin", "ngay_cap_pin", "dambao_pin", "loai_inver", "ma_inver", "ten_inver", "so_inver", "ngay_cap_inver", "dambao_inver", "loai_acquy", "ma_acquy", "ten_acquy", "so_acquy", "ngay_cap_acquy", "dambao_acquy", "du_hang", "du_dk", "so_hd", "tyle_tamung", "am", "han_thicong", "so_ngau_tamung", "thang_dk_DT", "mat_bang", "quahan_thicong", "BG_VHKT", "tien_do", "ngay_thicong_xong", "ngay_BBNT", "vuong", "vuong_chitiet", "do_chacchan_VHKT", "ngay_dien_thicong", "ngay_BG_sang", "thang_ky", "nam_ky", "today_ngayBG", "today_ngaythicong", "chac_chan","cn_matbang", "cn_hanghoa", "cn_tiendo", "cn_thangdk", "cn_ngaybatdau", "cn_ngaythicongxong","ngay_ht")
colnames(b2c_aio1) <- n_aio

#Chuyển các cột list định dạng giống ngày về date %m-%Y
b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(namthang_ky = toString(unlist(namthang_ky))) %>%
  mutate(thang_dk_DT = toString(unlist(thang_dk_DT))) %>%
  mutate(cn_thangdk = toString(unlist(cn_thangdk))) %>%
  ungroup()

b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>%
  mutate(
    namthang_ky = ifelse(
      is.na(namthang_ky),
      NA_character_,
      format(
        as.Date(namthang_ky, format = "%Y-%m-%d"),
        format = "%m-%Y"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    cn_thangdk = ifelse(
      is.na(cn_thangdk),
      NA_character_,
      format(
        as.Date(cn_thangdk, format = "%Y-%m-%d"),
        format = "%m-%Y"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    thang_dk_DT = ifelse(
      is.na(thang_dk_DT),
      NA_character_,
      format(
        as.Date(thang_dk_DT, format = "%Y-%m-%d"),
        format = "%m-%Y"
      )
    )
  )

b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>%
  mutate(across(c(cn_ngaybatdau, cn_ngaythicongxong, ngay_ht), ~ {
    x <- if (is.list(.)) sapply(., function(v) if (is.null(v) || length(v) == 0) NA_character_ else as.character(v[[1]])) else as.character(.)
    x[x == "NULL"] <- NA
    as.Date(x, format = "%Y-%m-%d")
  }))

####Chuyển tất cả các cột list về number
# Tách riêng list cols
list_cols <- names(b2c_aio1)[sapply(b2c_aio1, is.list)]

# Kiểm tra col nào chứa date
date_list_cols <- list_cols[sapply(list_cols, function(col) {
  non_null <- Filter(Negate(is.null), b2c_aio1[[col]])
  if (length(non_null) == 0) return(FALSE)  # ✅ toàn NULL → bỏ qua
  inherits(non_null[[1]], c("Date", "POSIXct", "POSIXt"))
})]

other_list_cols <- setdiff(list_cols, date_list_cols)

# Xử lý cột thường
b2c_aio1 <- b2c_aio1 %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(other_list_cols), ~ {
    sapply(., function(x) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) NA else x[[1]])
  }))

```


## <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**I. DỰ KIẾN LÊN DOANH THU NGUỒN VIỆC TỒN**</span>
### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**1. Timeline dự kiến doanh thu**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
b2c_aio1 %>% drop_na(ma_hd) -> b2c_aio1
thang_n <- format(as.Date(today(), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y")
thang_n1 <- format(as.Date(Sys.Date() %m+% months(1), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y")
thang_n2 <- format(as.Date(Sys.Date() %m+% months(2), format = , format = "%Y-%m-%d"), format = "%m-%Y")
b2c_aio1 %>%
  group_by(ma_tinh, am) %>%
  summarise(so_hd = sum(!is.na(ma_hd)),
            gtri_hd = sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd)], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,
            so_hd_n = sum(!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n, na.rm = TRUE),
            gtri_hd_n = sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,
            so_hd_n1 = sum(!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n1, na.rm = TRUE),
            gtri_hd_n1 = sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n1], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,
            so_hd_n2 = sum(!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n2, na.rm = TRUE),
            gtri_hd_n2 = sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n2], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,
            so_hd_khac = so_hd - so_hd_n - so_hd_n1 - so_hd_n2,
            gtri_hd_khac = gtri_hd - gtri_hd_n - gtri_hd_n1 - gtri_hd_n2) -> bc_timeline_dt

```



```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
kq1 <- unlist(bc_timeline_dt[1])
kq2 <- unlist(bc_timeline_dt[2])
kq3 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),3]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq4 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),4]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq5 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),5]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq6 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),6]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq7 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),7]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq8 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),8]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq9 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),9]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq10 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),10]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq11 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),11]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq12 <- accounting(unlist(bc_timeline_dt[c(1:nrow(bc_timeline_dt)),12]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")

bc_timeline_dt_tb <- data.frame(kq1,kq2, kq3, kq4,kq5,kq6,kq7,kq8,kq9, kq10,kq11,kq12)
bc_timeline_dt_tb[3:12] <- lapply(bc_timeline_dt_tb[3:12], as.numeric)
rownames(bc_timeline_dt_tb) <- NULL
```

```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
shared_bc_timeline_dt_tb <- SharedData$new(bc_timeline_dt_tb)

shiny::fluidRow(
  shiny::column(
    9,
    reactable(shared_bc_timeline_dt_tb, minRows = 3,width = 1250, height = "auto", pagination = FALSE, groupBy = "kq2", 
              columnGroups = list(
    colGroup("Tổng NV tồn", columns = c("kq3", "kq4"), sticky = "left", headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center")),
    colGroup(paste0("DK DT tháng ", thang_n), columns = c("kq5", "kq6"), sticky = "left", headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center")),
    colGroup(paste0("DK DT tháng ", thang_n1), columns = c("kq7", "kq8"), sticky = "left", headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center")),
    colGroup(paste0("DK DT tháng ", thang_n2), columns = c("kq9", "kq10"), sticky = "left", headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center")),
    colGroup(paste0("DK DT sau tháng ", thang_n2), columns = c("kq11", "kq12"), sticky = "left", headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"))
  ),
  resizable = TRUE,
  fullWidth = TRUE,
  wrap = FALSE,
  searchable = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, style = list(fontSize = "16px"),
  rowStyle = JS("
    function(rowInfo, state) {
      // Kiểm tra có subRows không → group row
      if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
        return {
          backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF',  // group row: trắng
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          color: '#000000',
          borderLeft: '2px solid transparent',
          transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease'
        };
      } else {
        return {
          borderLeft: '2px solid #ffa62d',
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',   // subrows: xám nhạt
          transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease'
        };
      }
    }
  "), 
  theme = reactableTheme(
  headerStyle = list(background = "#F56222"),
  rowStyle = list(
    `&:hover` = list(
      backgroundColor = "#FFE4CC !important",
      cursor = "pointer"
    )
  )
),
  defaultColDef = colDef(
    headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal",textAlign = "center"),
    footerStyle = list(fontWeight = "bold", color = "#B22222")
  ),
  defaultSorted = c("kq1","kq2"),
  striped = FALSE,
  columns = list(
    
    kq1 = colDef(name = "Mã tỉnh", 
                 aggregate = JS("
        function(values, rows) {
          return values.join(', ')
        }
      "),
      aggregated = JS("
        function(cellInfo) {
          return React.createElement('span', {
            title: cellInfo.value,
            style: {cursor: 'help', fontWeight: 'bold'},
          }, cellInfo.value);
        }
      "),
      # Visual feedback khi hover
      style  = JS("
    function(rowInfo, state) {
      // Kiểm tra có subRows không → group row
      if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
        return {
          cursor: 'help',  // group row: trắng
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
          textDecoration: 'underline dotted'
        };
      } else {
        return {
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5'   // subrows: xám nhạt
        };
      }
    }
  "),
     align = "left", width = 100, footer = "Tổng"),
    kq2 = colDef(name = "AM",
                 cell = JS("
        function(cellInfo) {
          // Add a tooltip to the grouped row header
          return '<span title=\"Group ' + cellInfo.value + '\">' + cellInfo.value + '</span>'
        }
      "),
      html = TRUE,
      aggregate = "count", align = "left", width = 150),
    kq3 = colDef(name = "Số lượng",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq4 = colDef(name = "Giá trị",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) formatC(sum(values), format = "f", digits = 0, big.mark = ",")),
    
    kq5 = colDef(name = "Số lượng",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq6 = colDef(name = "Giá trị",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L))),
    
    kq7 = colDef(name = "Số lượng",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq8 = colDef(name = "Giá trị",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L))),
    
    kq9 = colDef(name = "Số lượng",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq10 = colDef(name = "Giá trị",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L))),
    
    kq11 = colDef(name = "Số lượng",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, footer = function(values) sprintf("%.0f", sum(values))),
    
    kq12 = colDef(name = "Giá trị",
      aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100, format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE), footer = function(values) sprintf("%s", format(sum(values), big.mark = ",", digits = 2L)))

  )
)))
```
<span style="color: #3333CC;font-family: cambria;">**_* Di chuột qua cột Mã tỉnh để xem list tỉnh_**</span>


### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**2. Tỷ lệ dự kiến tháng ** <strong>`r thang_n`</strong></span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
b2c_aio1 %>%
  group_by(ma_tinh, am) %>%
  summarise(gtri_hd = round(sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd)], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,0),
            so_hd_ton = sum(!is.na(ma_hd), na.rm = TRUE),
            gtri_hd_n = round(sum(gtri[!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n], na.rm = TRUE)/10^6,0),
            so_hd = sum(!is.na(ma_hd) & thang_dk_DT == thang_n, na.rm = TRUE),
            ty_le = gtri_hd_n*100/gtri_hd) -> bc_dk_thang_n

```


```{r,out.width = '120%',fig.width=7, fig.height=4, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(highcharter)
library(htmlwidgets)

thu_tu_am <- bc_dk_thang_n %>%
  group_by(am) %>%
  summarise(tong = sum(gtri_hd, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(tong)) %>%
  pull(am)

bc_dk_thang_n$am <- factor(bc_dk_thang_n$am, levels = thu_tu_am)
bc_dk_thang_n    <- bc_dk_thang_n %>% arrange(am, ma_tinh)

n_total   <- nrow(bc_dk_thang_n)

am_groups <- bc_dk_thang_n %>%
  mutate(idx = row_number() - 1) %>%
  group_by(am) %>%
  summarise(n_cols = n(), .groups = "drop")

am_groups_json <- toJSON(
  list(am     = as.character(am_groups$am),
       n_cols = am_groups$n_cols),
  auto_unbox = TRUE
)

hc <- highchart() %>% 
  hc_chart(type = "column") %>%
  hc_xAxis(categories = bc_dk_thang_n$ma_tinh, labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria")),
           crosshair = list(
    width = 40,              # độ rộng vùng highlight
    color = "rgba(180,180,180,0.2)",  # màu xám nhạt trong suốt
    zIndex = 0              # nằm dưới các bar
  )) %>%
  hc_title(text = "Tỷ lệ dự kiến doanh thu tháng hiện tại",
           margin = 20, 
           align = "center",
           style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",fontFamily = "cambria",fontSize = "20px")
           ) %>% 
  hc_plotOptions(
  column = list(
    states = list(
      hover = list(
        color = NULL  # để override màu theo từng series
      ),
      inactive = list(
        opacity = 0.3
      )
    )
  ),
  series = list(
    states = list(
      inactive = list(
        opacity = 0.3
      )
    )
  )
) %>%
  hc_yAxis_multiples(list(lineWidth = 3, 
                          title = list(text = "Dự kiến DT", style=list(fontWeight = "bold",fontSize = "15px",fontFamily = "cambria")), 
                          labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria"))),
                     list(showLastLabel = TRUE, opposite = TRUE, 
                          title = list(text = "%HT", style=list(fontWeight = "bold",fontSize = "15px",fontFamily = "cambria")), 
                          labels = list(style=list(fontSize = "12px",fontFamily = "cambria")))) %>%
  hc_add_series(name = "Tổng NV tồn", 
                data = lapply(seq_along(bc_dk_thang_n$gtri_hd), function(i) {
      list(y = round(bc_dk_thang_n$gtri_hd[i], 0),
           so_hd_ton = bc_dk_thang_n$so_hd_ton[i])
    }),
                states = list(
      hover = list(color = "#808080")  # trắng khi hover
    ),
                tooltip = list(columnFormat = paste0("Kế hoạch", "\n",accounting(bc_dk_thang_n$gtri_hd, big.mark = ",", digits = 2L, format = "d"), "TTQH"))) %>%
  hc_add_series(name = paste0("DK DT tháng ", thang_n),
                data = lapply(seq_along(bc_dk_thang_n$gtri_hd_n), function(i) {
      list(y = round(bc_dk_thang_n$gtri_hd_n[i], 0),
           so_hd = bc_dk_thang_n$so_hd[i])
    }),
                states = list(
      hover = list(color = "#8DB600")  # xanh lá mạ khi hover
    )) %>%
  hc_add_series(name = "Tỷ lệ (%)",data = round(bc_dk_thang_n$ty_le,0), type = "spline", yAxis = 1,dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{y}%")) %>%
  hc_tooltip(
    shared = TRUE,
    useHTML = TRUE,
    # ✅ Bọc toàn bộ JS() bằng paste0() để R điền thang_n vào trước khi render
    formatter = JS(paste0("
      function() {
        var s = '<b>' + this.x + '</b><br/>';

        var gtri_hd = 0, gtri_hd_n = 0, ty_le = 0, so_hd_ton = 0, so_hd = 0;

        for (var i = 0; i < this.points.length; i++) {
          var name = this.points[i].series.name;
          var pt   = this.points[i].point;
          var val  = this.points[i].y;

          if (name === 'Tổng NV tồn')              { gtri_hd  = val; so_hd_ton = pt.so_hd_ton; }
          if (name === 'DK DT tháng ", thang_n, "') { gtri_hd_n = val; so_hd    = pt.so_hd; }
          if (name === 'Tỷ lệ (%)')                   ty_le    = val;
        }

        s += '<span style=\"color:#D9D9D9\">●</span> Tổng NV tồn: <b>' + 
               Highcharts.numberFormat(gtri_hd, 0, '.', ',') + 
             '</b> ~ Số HĐ tồn: <b>' + so_hd_ton + '</b><br/>';

        s += '<span style=\"color:#C84309\">●</span> DK DT tháng ", thang_n, ": <b>' + 
               Highcharts.numberFormat(gtri_hd_n, 0, '.', ',') + 
             '</b> ~ Số HĐ DK: <b>' + so_hd + '</b><br/>';

        s += '<span style=\"color:#645889\">●</span> Tỷ lệ (%): <b>' + ty_le + '</b>';

        return s;
      }
    "))
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(c("#D9D9D9", "#C84309","#645889")) %>%
  hc_legend(labels = list(style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",fontFamily = "cambria",fontSize = "20px"))) %>%
  hc_exporting(
    enabled = TRUE,
    filename = "custom-file-name"
    )

onRender(hc, paste0("
function(el, x) {
  var groups  = ", am_groups_json, ";
  var N       = ", n_total, ";
  var nGroups = groups.am.length;

  function tryDraw() {
    /* Lấy chart qua container ID — không dùng Highcharts.charts index */
    var container = el.querySelector('.highcharts-container');
    if (!container) { setTimeout(tryDraw, 200); return; }

    var chart = null;
    for (var i = 0; i < Highcharts.charts.length; i++) {
      var c = Highcharts.charts[i];
      if (c && c.renderTo && el.contains(c.renderTo)) {
        chart = c;
        break;
      }
    }
    if (!chart || !chart.plotWidth || chart.plotWidth === 0) {
      setTimeout(tryDraw, 200); return;
    }

    var pLeft  = chart.plotLeft;
    var pRight = chart.chartWidth - pLeft - chart.plotWidth;
    var colW   = chart.plotWidth / N;
    var pullUp = chart.marginBottom - 25;

    el.style.position = 'relative';

    /* Xóa element cũ nếu re-render */
    var old = el.querySelectorAll('._am_sep, ._am_row');
    old.forEach(function(o) { o.parentNode.removeChild(o); });

    /* Đường dọc nét đứt */
    var cumCols = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < nGroups - 1; i++) {
      cumCols += groups.n_cols[i];
      var sepX = pLeft + cumCols * colW;
      var sep  = document.createElement('div');
      sep.className = '_am_sep';
      sep.style.cssText = [
        'position:absolute',
        'left:'   + Math.round(sepX) + 'px',
        'top:'    + chart.plotTop + 'px',
        'width:1px',
        'height:' + (chart.plotHeight + 18) + 'px',
        'border-left:1px dashed #999999',
        'pointer-events:none',
        'z-index:3'
      ].join(';');
      el.appendChild(sep);
    }

    /* Flex row label AM */
    var row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = '_am_row';
    row.style.cssText = [
      'display:flex',
      'margin-top:-' + pullUp + 'px',
      'padding-left:' + pLeft + 'px',
      'padding-right:' + pRight + 'px',
      'width:' + chart.chartWidth + 'px',
      'box-sizing:border-box',
      'pointer-events:none'
    ].join(';');

    for (var j = 0; j < nGroups; j++) {
      var cell = document.createElement('div');
      cell.textContent = groups.am[j];
      cell.style.cssText = [
        'flex:' + groups.n_cols[j],
        'text-align:center',
        'font-size:12px',
        'font-family:Cambria,serif',
        'font-weight:bold',
        'color:#333333',
        'border-top:2px solid #555555',
        'padding-top:4px'
      ].join(';');
      row.appendChild(cell);
    }
    el.appendChild(row);
  }

  /* Thử nhiều lần với delay tăng dần — đảm bảo chạy cả Netlify */
  setTimeout(tryDraw, 300);
  setTimeout(tryDraw, 800);
  setTimeout(tryDraw, 1500);
}
"))

```
